description: Create comprehensive figure showing PTGES3L-AARSD1 genomic architecture and readthrough explanation for HSP90 link
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 9))

# Colors
c_ptges3l = '#C73E1D'   # Red - PTGES3L
c_aarsd1 = '#2E86AB'    # Blue - AARSD1 AlaX
c_readthrough = '#F18F01' # Orange - readthrough region
c_cterm = '#3B7A57'      # Green - C-terminal
c_inactive = '#999999'    # Gray - inactive
c_active = '#228B22'      # Green - active

# Title
ax.text(7, 9.5, 'AARSD1 Genomic Context: PTGES3L-AARSD1 Readthrough', 
        fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', ha='center')
ax.text(7, 9.1, 'Chromosome 17 — Explains HSP90 cochaperone attribution', 
        fontsize=10, ha='center', color='gray')

# === Row 1: Genomic arrangement ===
y = 8.0
ax.text(0.5, y+0.3, 'Genomic\nlocus', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', va='center')

# PTGES3L gene
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, y-0.15), 3, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_ptges3l, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8))
ax.text(4, y+0.1, 'PTGES3L', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(4, y-0.3, 'p23/wos2 family', ha='center', fontsize=7, color=c_ptges3l)

# Arrow for readthrough
ax.annotate('', xy=(6.8, y+0.1), xytext=(5.5, y+0.1),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=c_readthrough, lw=2, ls='--'))
ax.text(6.15, y+0.4, 'readthrough', fontsize=7, color=c_readthrough, ha='center', style='italic')

# AARSD1 gene
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((6.8, y-0.15), 5, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_aarsd1, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8))
ax.text(9.3, y+0.1, 'AARSD1', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(9.3, y-0.3, 'AlaX editing enzyme', ha='center', fontsize=7, color=c_aarsd1)

# Direction arrow
ax.annotate('', xy=(12.5, y+0.1), xytext=(11.8, y+0.1),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1.5))

# === Row 2: Canonical AARSD1 (isoform 1) ===
y = 6.5
ax.text(0.5, y+0.1, 'Isoform 1\n(canonical)\n412 aa', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', va='center')

# Small unique N-term
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3, y-0.15), 0.5, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.03",
             facecolor='#D4A5A5', edgecolor='black'))
ax.text(3.25, y+0.1, 'N', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8)

# AlaX domain
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((3.5, y-0.15), 5, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_aarsd1, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.85))
ax.text(6, y+0.1, 'AlaX Editing Domain', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# C-terminal
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((8.5, y-0.15), 3, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_cterm, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.7))
ax.text(10, y+0.1, 'C-terminal', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=9)

# Status
ax.text(12.5, y+0.1, '✓ ACTIVE\nSer-tRNA(Ala)\ndeacylase', fontsize=8, color=c_active, 
        fontweight='bold', va='center')

# Zinc binding markers
for x_pos, label in [(5.2, 'H109'), (5.5, 'H113'), (7.7, 'C209'), (8.0, 'H213')]:
    ax.plot(x_pos, y+0.5, 'v', color='#FFD700', markersize=6, markeredgecolor='black', markeredgewidth=0.5)
    ax.text(x_pos, y+0.65, label, fontsize=5, ha='center', fontweight='bold')

# === Row 3: Readthrough (isoform 2) ===
y = 5.0
ax.text(0.5, y+0.1, 'Isoform 2\n(readthrough)\n525 aa', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', va='center')

# PTGES3L portion
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((2.5, y-0.15), 2.5, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_ptges3l, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8))
ax.text(3.75, y+0.1, 'PTGES3L\n(p23-like)', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# AlaX domain
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((5, y-0.15), 4, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_inactive, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.6))
ax.text(7, y+0.1, 'AlaX Domain (INHIBITED)', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=8)

# C-terminal  
ax.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((9, y-0.15), 2.5, 0.5, boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
             facecolor=c_inactive, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.5))
ax.text(10.25, y+0.1, 'C-terminal', ha='center', va='center', color='white', fontsize=8)

# Status
ax.text(12.5, y+0.1, '✗ INACTIVE\nfor editing\n(Nawaz 2011)', fontsize=8, color='#CC0000', 
        fontweight='bold', va='center')

# === Explanation box ===
y = 3.0
explanation = """KEY INSIGHT: The HSP90 cochaperone association derives from the adjacent PTGES3L gene,
a p23/wos2 family member, NOT from AARSD1 itself.

• PTGES3L-AARSD1 readthrough (NCBI Gene 100885850) = isoform 2 (Q9BTE6-2)
• The p23-like domain is from PTGES3L, a separate gene on chromosome 17
• STRING: No HSP90 in AARSD1's top 20 interaction partners
• IntAct: Q9BTE6-2 (readthrough) has 2.2× more interactions than canonical Q9BTE6
• The readthrough fusion is catalytically INACTIVE for editing
• No TPR domain exists in any AARSD1 product"""

ax.text(0.5, y+0.5, explanation, fontsize=8, va='top', family='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='#888', alpha=0.9))

# Legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=c_ptges3l, label='PTGES3L (p23/wos2 family)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=c_aarsd1, label='AARSD1 AlaX Editing Domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=c_cterm, label='C-terminal Extension'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFD700', label='Zinc-binding catalytic residues'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor=c_readthrough, label='Readthrough junction'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower center', ncol=3, fontsize=7, frameon=True)

ax.set_xlim(0, 14)
ax.set_ylim(0.5, 10.2)
ax.set_frame_on(False)
ax.set_xticks([])
ax.set_yticks([])

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('aarsd1_readthrough_architecture.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Readthrough architecture figure saved.")
